name: korean-docs
description: Korean document reading and writing for agents — parse HWP 3.x/5.x, HWPX, HWPML, PDF, XLS, XLSX, DOCX to markdown, fill government/office forms, and patch documents back with formatting preserved (powered by the vendored kordoc engine).

interface.shortDescription: Read, compare, fill, and format-preserving-write Korean documents (HWP/HWPX/PDF/XLS/DOCX).
interface.longDescription: Gives agents first-class Korean document ability via the kordoc engine: HWP 3.x/5.x, HWPX, HWPML, PDF, XLS, XLSX, DOCX to markdown with 99.9%+ recall and exact table reproduction, government form filling, cross-format diffing (신구대조표), and byte-preserving round-trip patches of HWP/HWPX files.
interface.defaultPrompt: 이 한글 문서를 읽고 요약해줘 (HWP/HWPX/PDF 모두 가능).
